---
applyTo: "README.md, docs/**/*.md"
description: "事実と計画の責任範囲を明確にしながら、簡潔で保守しやすい Markdown 更新を行うためのドキュメント指示テンプレート。"
---

# Documentation Instruction Template

Adjust `applyTo` to match the actual repository before using this file.

## Writing Rules

- Keep sections short and easy to scan.
- Update linked paths, commands, and examples together so they stay consistent.
- Separate confirmed facts from plans or open questions.

## Change Discipline

- Use absolute dates when the timing matters.
- When a doc introduces a new workflow or source, update the source-of-truth page in the same change.
- Do not leave placeholders without marking them clearly.
